member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Mocks.Factories.MockClaimsPrincipalFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating a mocked . Produces objects based on KnownUsers and KnownRoles.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Mocks.Factories.MockRoleManagerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating mocked RoleManager instances preconfigured with KnownRoles from Test.Data.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Mocks.Factories.MockTokenProviderFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating a mocked IUserTwoFactorTokenProvider. Used for Identity flows like password reset, email confirmation, 2FA.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Mocks.Factories.MockTokenServiceFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating a mocked ITokenOrchestration. Used for orchestration-level JWT scenarios.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Mocks.Factories.MockUserManagerFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating mocked instances preconfigured with .
